title: refund — permissions
description: Two audiences. Tenant plane (sanctum) — owner + finance + admin manage refunds + read refund ledger; support role reads only; marketing role reads reports only (for ROAS analysis); customers hold `refunds.request` to submit own refund requests + `refunds.cancel` scoped to own refunds. Platform plane (platform_admin) — cross-tenant read for support intervention + regulator-facing reporting. All tenant permissions carry the appropriate resource prefix (`refunds.` for the aggregate, `refunds.view-financials` for confidential fields).

permissions.name: refunds.create
permissions.description: Admin-initiated refund path (POST /api/v1/refunds). Distinct from refunds.request (customer path).

permissions.name: refunds.request
permissions.description: Customer-initiated refund path (POST /api/v1/refunds/mine). Requires `refund_customer_self_service` entitlement. Customer-allowed reasons only.

permissions.name: refunds.approve
permissions.description: Approve OR reject a refund. Segregation of duties — REFUSED when caller is initiator (SOX §404). Same permission covers both approve + reject actions.

permissions.name: refunds.cancel
permissions.description: Cancel a pending refund. Customer role scoped to own refunds via policy; admin roles can cancel any tenant refund still in awaiting_approval / approved.

permissions.name: refunds.force-fail
permissions.description: Admin escape hatch — mark a stuck provider_error refund as failed after manual provider-side investigation. High-privilege — only admin + owner.

permissions.name: refunds.reconcile
permissions.description: Dispatches ReconcileRefundsJob. Sweeps stuck refunds after provider outage recovery.

permissions.name: refunds.view-report
permissions.description: Read the refund volume report. Marketing role holds for ROAS analysis (refund rate feeds attribution modelling).

permissions.name: refunds.view-financials
permissions.description: Read the confidential financial fields: amount_cents, currency, provider_fee_reversal_cents, exchange_rate. Redactor strips these when the caller lacks this permission.

permissions.name: platform.refunds.pii.view
permissions.description: Cross-tenant view WITH customer PII (customer_id / customer name / email unmasked). Reserved for regulator-facing investigations. Default view hashes PII.
